summary: Build an app that enables farmers to access markets directly (direct-to-market platform).

existing_features.title: Implement Internet Identity authentication and session-aware UI so users can sign in/out and the app can associate all actions (profiles, listings, orders) with the signed-in principal.

Create user profile onboarding and management with two roles: Farmer and Buyer. Profiles must include: display name, role, location (free-text), phone/email (optional free-text), and a short bio/description.

Implement product listings that farmers can create, edit, publish/unpublish, and delete. Listing fields: title, product category, unit (e.g., kg, crate, bunch), available quantity, price per unit, harvest/availability date (optional), location (free-text), and description.
Add marketplace browsing with search and filters for buyers: keyword search (title/description), category filter, location keyword filter, and sort by newest and price (low-to-high / high-to-low).

Implement an order/request flow: buyers can place an order request against a listing specifying requested quantity, proposed pickup/delivery note (free-text), and optional message. Farmers can accept or decline. Both sides can track status.

Add a simple asynchronous inquiry/comments thread per order request (not real-time): buyer and farmer can post messages on the order detail page, shown in chronological order with author and timestamp.

Provide core navigation and pages: Marketplace, Listing Detail, Create/Edit Listing (farmer-only), My Listings (farmer-only), Sales (farmer-only), Purchases (buyer-only), Profile, and a lightweight landing page explaining the app.

Design direction: apply a consistent, agriculture-inspired visual theme (avoid blue/purple) using earthy greens, warm neutrals, and clear typography; include a cohesive layout system (header, content width, cards, forms) across all pages.
Add basic data validation and error handling across forms (profile, listing, order request): required fields, numeric validation for quantity/price, and user-friendly error messages in English.
Generate and include required static images under frontend/public/assets/generated and render them in the UI (landing page and header branding) without routing images through the backend.

new_feature_requests.summary: Create a direct-to-market app for farmers to access and sell to buyers without intermediaries

Persist all core entities in the Motoko backend (profiles, listings, orders, order messages) and expose a minimal candid API to support the UI flows, including role- and ownership-based access control for writes and sensitive reads.

imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- App logo mark: simple sprout + market stall icon, flat vector style, earthy green and warm neutral palette (farm-market-logo.dim_512x512.png)
- Landing hero illustration: farmer holding produce facing a buyer across a small market table, minimal flat illustration, warm tones, plenty of whitespace (farm-market-hero.dim_1600x900.png)
- Category icon set: 6 flat icons (vegetables, fruits, grains, dairy, livestock, herbs), consistent stroke/shape style (category-icons-sprite.dim_1024x1024.png)

projectName: Direct-to-market marketplace app for farmers and buyers
